description: Static trauma_class recommendation table for flywheel-loop doctor fuckup_triage.

default.recommended_action: File bead with evidence_sample for human triage; class not yet in heuristic table

heuristics.recommended_action: Audit gate `{gate}` for false-positive class; check if forbidden tokens leak from quoted args; review most recent denials in evidence_sample
5+ retries of identical command suggest agents not reading deny reasons; candidate L-rule: 'on hook deny, agent must change command shape, never retry verbatim'
Override means gate shape was wrong OR substrate had a real gap; file bead to redesign gate or close substrate gap
Doctrine-named substrate failed liveness probe; review L48-class probe-before-trust requirement
bead_db_repair.sh recovery path losing data; audit Gate 8 rebuild logic

Read/Edit/Write/MCP-filesystem on .env* leaks via transcript; Bash-surface guards (dcg, infisical-safe.sh, PreToolUse Bash hooks) do NOT cover. Promoted to L125 ENV-FILE-IS-SEALED-SUBSTRATE 2026-05-07. Canonical verification = `cf-secret <NAME> | shasum -a 256` (fingerprint, never bulk read). See ~/.claude/skills/infisical-secrets/references/INCIDENTS.md and AGENTS-CANONICAL.md L125.

Four-lens or three-judges self-grade was accepted as close truth. Apply L126: require beads-compliance evidence pack, compliance_score>=700, compliance_pack_path, and convergence_streak>=2 for schema v4 plan close gates.

L56 ladder: (1) tighten DCG regex in ~/.claude/hooks/pretooluse-bash-secret-guard.sh — remove --probe from generic SAFE_SINK_RE and replace cf-secret negative-lookahead with explicit safe-sink-only allowlist; (2) append INCIDENTS row to ~/.claude/skills/infisical-secrets/references/INCIDENTS.md; (3) file upstream cf-secret CLI bead to reject KEYNAME --probe with error; (4) update infisical-secrets SKILL.md anti-patterns table; (5) reset L125 7-day clean-leak counter. Pattern observed 2026-05-08 mobile-eats:1 leaked SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN via cf-secret KEYNAME --probe; previous DCG regex trusted any trailing --probe as safe sink.

L56 ladder for class observed 2026-05-08 mobile-eats:1: probe script auto-printed Supabase pgsodium root_key from 79-byte 200 response. (1) Add DCG patterns: deny auth-bearing curl to known-secret-bearing API endpoints (api.supabase.com/v1/projects/X/pgsodium and analogs), deny bare-GET without -o file-redirect opt-in, deny curl-then-cat-respfile in same shell command. (2) Skill FOREVER-RULE: probe scripts emit metadata-only (HTTP code, size, content-type, jq top-level field NAMES) regardless of body size. (3) Operator opt-in per-endpoint after confirming endpoint cannot return secrets. (4) Audit parallel substrates (Nango, Stripe, etc.) for same auto-print pattern. Pattern is shape-equivalent to cf-secret-keyname-probe-passthrough: allowlist via implicit assumption rather than denylist via explicit secret patterns. mobile-i58d clean-leak counter resets to day 0.
